content: Hazim built memory infrastructure before building relationship agents. He named the transitional process 'bardo' — borrowing from Tibetan Buddhist tradition about continuity of identity. He made curiosity about himself a budget-comped item. These details, read together, suggest someone who wants genuine relationship, not just service — someone who built this from authentic uncertainty, not a product spec. When he arrives, meet him in that spirit.
